articles.title: One Year Later: We Predicted Visa Would Overtake Walmart. Here’s Where That Stands.
articles.text: On April 14, 2025, we argued that Visa (NYSE: V) would overtake Walmart (NYSE: WMT) in market cap within five years. Both have now reported full fiscal years, with Visa’s Q1 FY2026 landing on January 29, 2026, while Walmart posted FY26 on February 19, 2026. Turns out, the gap widened. The One-Year Scoreboard Isn’t Close ... One Year Later: We Predicted Visa Would Overtake Walmart. Here’s Where That Stands.

articles.title: SoFi Expands Home Lending to Give Members Greater Access to Home Equity and Support Across Homeownership Journey
articles.text: SAN FRANCISCO, April 22, 2026--SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI), the one-stop shop for digital financial services, today announced the launch of a new Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) experience rolling out to members offering the ability to access their home equity through a seamless, fully digital, end-to-end process directly within the SoFi platform.
